species: we identify a TSSK homolog in Drosophila, CG14305 (termed dTSSK)
tissue: CG14305 is predominately expressed in testes
cell_type: dTSSK signals exclusively localized to postmeiotic spermatid bundles
disease_state: testis-specific serine/threonine kinases (TSSKs) and male infertility in mammals
sample_source: dTSSK was specifically expressed in testicular tissue
sex: Adult dTSSK−/− flies were morphologically similar to wild-type flies but exhibited male-specific infertility
